old_value: A plain of coarse sediment (muddy gravel) with cobbles and pebbles and a few small boulders and shells. Dense stands of Laminaria saccharina with Chorda filum and filamentous browns and foliose reds growing profusely in clearings. Sabella pavonina common amongst algae, and a few Modiolus modiolus present. Large clearings of sediment with Chone spp. and occasional Branchiomma bombyx.
new_value: Chondria tenuissima has been given a nominal abundance value of Present for this record as in Arev it had no abundance value. Extensive smooth bedrock dominated by encrusting brown algae with vertical and some overhanging surfaces with boulders between and fringing the muddy gravel slope. Dominated at shallow depths by dense patches of Brongniartella byssoides with Bonnemaisonia asparagoides and sparse Laminaria hyperborea and L. saccharina. Deeper rocks grazed by Echinus esculentus but with Parasmittina trispinosa and Alcyonium digitatum characterising vertical or overhanging surfaces. Boulders on/near to the sediment dominated by Balanus crenatus and Rhizocaulus verticillatus in places.

old_value: Chondria tenuissima has been given a nominal abundance value of Present for this record as in Arev it had no abundance value. Extensive smooth bedrock dominated by encrusting brown algae with vertical and some overhanging surfaces with boulders between and fringing the muddy gravel slope. Dominated at shallow depths by dense patches of Brongniartella byssoides with Bonnemaisonia asparagoides and sparse Laminaria hyperborea and L. saccharina. Deeper rocks grazed by Echinus esculentus but with Parasmittina trispinosa and Alcyonium digitatum characterising vertical or overhanging surfaces. Boulders on/near to the sediment dominated by Balanus crenats and Rhizocaulus verticillatus in places.
new_value: Chondria tenuissima has been given a nominal abundance value of Present for this record as in Arev it had no abundance value. Deeper rocks grazed by Echinus esculentus but with Parasmittina trispinosa and Alcyonium digitatum characterising vertical or overhanging surfaces. old_value: Chondria tenuissima has been given a nominal abundance value of Present for this record as in Arev it had no abundance value. Extensive smooth bedrock dominated by encrusting brown algae with verticl and some overhanging surfaces with boulders between and fringing the muddy gravel slope. Dominated at shallow depths by dense patches of Brongniartella byssoides with Bonnemaisonia asparagoides and sparse Laminaria hyperborea and L. saccharina. Deeper rocks grazed by Echinus esculentus but with Parasmittina trispinosa and Alcyonium digitatum characterising vertical or overhanging surfaces. Boulders on/near to the sediment dominated by Balanus crenatus and Rhizocaulus verticillatus in places.

old_value: Chondria tenuissima has been given a nominal abundance value of Present for this record as in Arev it had no abundance value. Extensive smooth bedrock dominated by encrusting brown algae with vertical and some overhanging surfaces with boulders between and fringing the muddy gravel slope. Dominated at shallow depths by dense patches of Brongniartella byssoides with Bonnemaisonia asparagqoides and sparse Laminaria hyperborea and L. saccharina. Deeper rocks grazed by Echinus esculentus but with Parasmittina trispinosa and Alcyonium digitatum characterising vertical or overhanging surfaces. Boulders on/near to the sediment dominated by Balanus crenatus and Rhizocaulus verticillatus in places.
